methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Lodge Systems is a pre-seed stage company operating in the Defense & Security sector, where the broader peer universe comprises 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms including Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI. However, the Defense & Security sector exhibits significant heterogeneity in business model, funding stage, and valuation tier.

The peer-median triangulation method is not applicable to Lodge Systems at this stage. Of 21 total same-sector peers identified, filtered analysis yielded zero same-stage comparables, one adjacent-stage peer, and zero similar-tier datapoints—below the minimum threshold of three observations needed for reliable median estimation. Applying an all-sector median would introduce material bias given the structural differences between pre-seed Defense & Security companies and the broader peer set, which skews toward later-stage and higher-valuation businesses.

Without sufficient narrow-peer triangulation data, a quantitative valuation range cannot be defensibly synthesized from the available comparables. Subsequent valuation work should either (1) expand the peer aperture to include adjacent security or hardware-defense sectors; (2) apply alternative methods such as venture capital method or discounted cash flow analysis using founder or sector-specific assumptions; or (3) await additional pre-seed Defense & Security datapoints as the company matures. The key uncertainty remains the absence of direct valuation anchors at pre-seed stage within this sector.
